name: qrv-verify
description: Standalone public verification service for QR-V records, QRVID lookup, branded verification pages, and JSON verification API.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check scripts/verify-domain-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/production-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/hostinger-start-check.mjs
scripts.validate:prod: npm run check && npm run smoke:prod
